quizShell.screen: flex h-[100dvh] min-h-0 w-full flex-col overflow-hidden bg-white
quizShell.header: grid shrink-0 grid-cols-3 items-center border-b border-gray-100 bg-white px-4 py-4
quizShell.main: relative z-0 flex min-h-0 w-full flex-1 flex-col items-center justify-start overflow-y-auto overflow-x-visible px-4 pb-4 pt-8 sm:px-6 sm:pt-10 md:pt-14

buttons.continue: inline-flex w-full max-w-[min(100%,20rem)] items-center justify-center rounded-full px-6 py-3.5 text-base font-semibold text-white transition-all active:scale-[0.98] sm:w-auto sm:max-w-none sm:px-10 md:px-12 bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600
buttons.continueDisabled: inline-flex w-full max-w-[min(100%,20rem)] items-center justify-center rounded-full px-6 py-3.5 text-base font-semibold text-white transition-all active:scale-[0.98] disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:bg-gray-300 disabled:opacity-90 enabled:bg-orange-500 enabled:hover:bg-orange-600 sm:w-auto sm:max-w-none sm:px-10 md:px-12

options.interactive: transition-all duration-200 ease-out hover:border-orange-300 hover:bg-orange-50/80 hover:shadow-md active:scale-[0.99] active:border-orange-400 active:bg-orange-100/60
options.cardSelected: border border-orange-500 bg-orange-50 shadow-md ring-2 ring-orange-200/90

gender.row: flex min-w-0 w-full cursor-pointer items-center gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200/90 bg-white px-4 py-[1.125rem] text-left shadow-[0_1px_3px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] sm:gap-4 sm:px-6

splash.title: text-center text-3xl font-bold leading-tight text-white drop-shadow-md sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl
splash.progressBar: relative mx-auto h-14 w-full max-w-md overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-black/50 shadow-inner ring-1 ring-white/10
splash.progressFill: absolute inset-y-0 left-0 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-600 via-orange-500 to-amber-400 transition-[width] duration-150 ease-linear

trustHero.screen: flex h-[100dvh] min-h-0 w-full flex-col overflow-hidden overflow-x-clip bg-[#f3e9dc]
trustHero.header: grid shrink-0 grid-cols-3 items-center border-b border-amber-200/50 bg-white/80 px-4 pb-4 pt-[max(1rem,env(safe-area-inset-top,0px))] backdrop-blur-sm
